_comment: Soft taper: linear-falloff Scale with SX=2.0. Top row scales 2× along X about origin (ACEN.Auto on a centered cube ⇒ origin); bottom row stays at original ±0.5. Cross-engine bit-perfect verified by tools/modo_diff/probe_taper.py + probe_taper_vibe3d.py — MODO's headless xfrm.transform SX channel works fine (same path shear's TX uses).
